textByHash.1178c193d98a63566eb0abae40e23617a6e36b92: You have proved yourself the stronger, human. Ask your questions.
textByHash.ebf5409246129ff57ed671c7310c959234f74c4f: Yu'biusk is another plane of existence. No goblin alive today has ever been there.
textByHash.ffc15796ff4fe1a235d4beb880404eaab9b9f921: It is many millennia since the Big High War God brought our ancestors from Yu'biusk, but the call to that plane is still strong in us.
textByHash.432e0fe8f0d91807c80f60024aacd65bd3f55c86: If the barriers between the planes were ever to be broken, goblin blood would call out and open a portal to Yu'biusk.
textByHash.c07e6ad16d7a3360f503b819afaf5196120d0e6a: His name is not important. He is not buried here. Before my time, priests were cremated, and their ashes scattered to the winds. You cannot talk to him.
textByHash.fe447755e4c65a81a15bfb539c44ba7d9726c5dc: You are a human, not one of the children of the Big High War God. For this reason, you had to prove yourself in combat before I could speak with you.
textByHash.55de49b7d494ea5fa29cab9b9f726dae1689bd3a: I cannot tell you. I no longer remember what it is like to be alive.
textByHash.ab3852cfb143f816321b6884d88610d7907f3454: Goodbye, human. I am sure that the Chosen Commander will find what she is looking for when you bring her to Yu'biusk.
